reason: 6 of 7 findings target internal Polaris bookkeeping files (3 from unrelated, in-progress clusters POL-494/POL-542 sitting untracked in the working tree; 3 from POL-547's own runtime artifacts: state.json, packets/*.json, clusters.json), and the 7th is a low-severity follow-up on the same POL-494 debris.
